narrative:
Amherst Township has 5,053 registered voters, with 55.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.0%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.4 percentage points.
